description: The Mercedes-Benz SL 65 AMG Black Series, produced in 2008-2009, was the most extreme AMG Black Series ever. Its twin-turbocharged 6.0-litre V12 produced 661 bhp and 738 lb-ft of torque. Stripped of its folding roof and given a fixed carbon-fibre hardtop, just 350 were built. It remains one of the most sought-after modern Mercedes.
